parsedJson.summary: The visual design is modern and clean, but the content strategy is confusing for a roofing business, and the primary call-to-action is a low-commitment email form rather than a direct contact method.

issues.title: Content does not match roofing industry
issues.what_observed: The headline reads 'Transform Your Local Business with Expert Digital Marketing' and the subhead is 'Flood your Business with Partners'.
issues.why_problem: A customer searching for 'roofing Brisbane' is looking for a roofer, not a marketing agency. This text signals that the website belongs to an SEO company, not a contractor. The visitor will immediately bounce because they cannot find roofing services.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: Headlines should focus on the service provided, e.g., 'Brisbane's Trusted Roofing Experts' or 'Quality Roof Repairs & Installations'.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Replace all marketing-focused copy with service-focused copy. The hero section must clearly state that this is a roofing company offering repairs, maintenance, or installation.
issues.plain_explanation: 网站上的文字是在推销“数字营销服务”，而不是推销“屋顶维修服务”。对于正在寻找屋顶工人的客户来说，这就像走进一家理发店却看到卖电脑的广告一样令人困惑。
issues.customer_impact: 这是最严重的问题。如果客户搜索“布里斯班屋顶维修”却看到营销广告，他们会认为这是一个错误的网站并立即离开。这会导致几乎 100% 的潜在客户流失，因为网站没有展示他们需要的服务。

issues.title: Primary CTA is an email form, not a phone call
issues.what_observed: The main call-to-action button is 'Book Free Strategy Session' next to an 'Enter Your Email Here' input field.
issues.why_problem: Local service customers (especially in emergencies like roof leaks) want immediate answers. They do not want to fill out a form or book a 'strategy session' (which sounds like a sales pitch for marketing). They want to call a phone number or request a quote.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: A large, high-contrast button that says 'Get a Free Quote' or 'Call Now' with a clickable phone number (tel: link) visible above the fold.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Replace the email input and 'Strategy Session' button with a prominent 'Get a Free Quote' button and a visible phone number in the header.
issues.plain_explanation: 主要按钮要求用户输入邮箱或预约“策略会议”，这对于急需修屋顶的客户来说太复杂了。他们想要的是直接打电话或获取报价，而不是填写表格。
issues.customer_impact: 本地服务客户通常希望立即获得帮助。要求填写表格会增加摩擦，导致约 30-50% 的潜在客户因为嫌麻烦而放弃联系。直接提供电话号码或简单的报价表单能显著提高转化率。

issues.title: Phone number is not in the main navigation
issues.what_observed: The top navigation bar contains links (Home, About Us, Services) and buttons (Client Login, Speak to an Expert), but no phone number is visible in the header.
issues.why_problem: Trust is built on accessibility. If a user cannot see a phone number at the very top of the page, they may doubt the legitimacy of the business or assume it is difficult to reach.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: A phone number (e.g., (07) 3132 8715) should be placed in the top right corner of the header, next to the logo or navigation links.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Add the phone number to the header navigation, ensuring it is clickable on mobile devices.
issues.plain_explanation: 网站顶部没有显示电话号码。对于本地服务业务来说，电话号码是建立信任的关键。如果客户第一眼看不到联系方式，他们可能会怀疑这家公司的可靠性。
issues.customer_impact: 研究表明，如果网站头部没有明显的联系方式，用户的信任度会显著下降。在本地搜索中，约 70% 的用户会在 5 秒内决定是否继续浏览。缺少显眼的电话号码可能导致大量潜在客户流失。

issues.title: Hero image shows an office, not a roof
issues.what_observed: The large image on the right shows a modern office reception desk with the 'Hurricane Digital' logo on the wall.
issues.why_problem: This reinforces the 'marketing agency' vibe. A roofing customer wants to see roofs, workers, or before/after shots of repairs. An office photo feels corporate and disconnected from the physical work.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: A high-quality photo of a completed roofing project, a team member on a roof, or a friendly team photo in front of a work van.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Replace the office reception photo with a relevant image of roofing work or the team at a job site.
issues.plain_explanation: 图片展示的是办公室前台，而不是屋顶或施工场景。客户希望看到与屋顶维修相关的图片，以确认这是一家专业的屋顶公司。
issues.customer_impact: 不相关的图片会让客户感到困惑，降低信任度。使用与业务相关的图片可以提高用户的停留时间和转化率，因为客户能立即识别出这是他们需要的服务。

positive_observations: The visual design is clean, with good use of whitespace and a professional color palette (blue/white).
The typography is modern and legible, with clear hierarchy between headlines and subheads.
The 'Speak to an Expert' button in the header is a good secondary call-to-action, though it needs to be more prominent.
redesign_priorities: 1. Rewrite all copy to focus on roofing services, not digital marketing.
2. Replace the email form with a 'Get a Free Quote' button and add a clickable phone number to the header.
3. Replace the office photo with a relevant image of roofing work or the team.
